subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qabil-i-Ja'far! Thy name hath been mentioned before the Wronged One and through His most great favor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل جعفر اسمت نزد مظلوم مذکور و بعنایت کبری
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
